_comment: Per-file multiset of hardcoded color values still present in tech-debt CSS. Each entry is the file's complete sorted, lowercased multiset of hex/rgb/rgba/hsl/hsla/oklch/color-mix/named-color matches. The guard fails on ANY mismatch (regression, partial sweep, or value-swap that keeps the count the same). To clear an entry, sweep the file to zero hardcodes and remove the key; to record a deliberate change, regenerate via `pnpm tokens:guard --update-baseline`.
